creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dikshie,

the port databases/rrdtool has been updated to 1.3.5 in the meantime,
which was a part of your patch, too. Could you please send a new patch
with your proposed changes against the current version of the port? Since
Sergey mentioned potential performance problems, would it be possible for
you to make disabling mmap an option that is off by default?

Best regards,
Stefan
